test_cases.input_summary: Mapping decision-makers around a proposed national ban on flavoured e-cigarettes, at the regulatory consultation stage
test_cases.notes: Excellent mapping of health regulators, industry groups, and public health campaigners. Pressure points were sharply identified for the consultation stage. Research checklist was immediately actionable.

test_cases.input_summary: Mapping decision-makers around a city council vote on affordable housing zoning changes
test_cases.notes: Good adaptation to local government context. Developer and community group dynamics were well-mapped. Interview priorities were practical. Slightly less detailed on the research checklist than other test cases.

test_cases.input_summary: Mapping decision-makers around an international trade agreement being negotiated between two countries
test_cases.notes: Strong on the international dimension — correctly identified trade ministries, negotiating teams, and industry advisory committees in both countries. Acknowledged the opacity of trade negotiations. Interview priorities were well-justified.
